description: Statistics graphic in black and white. The full-bleed background is a desaturated black-and-white photograph of Donald Trump standing in a factory setting with overhead warehouse lighting, steel framing, and a partly visible 'JOBS!' banner at left, with his hands together as if clapping and looking toward the viewer; he wears a dark suit, tie, and American-flag lapel pin. Overlaid across the lower center in large green serif numerals is '$3,500'. Below it, in white serif type, is the caption 'Average Tax Cut the American Taxpayer Will Receive This Year.' At the bottom center is the small white line-art White House emblem.
notable_text: $3,500 | Average Tax Cut the American Taxpayer Will Receive This Year
